case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO / TAX COLLECTOR VS. LOTTIE TITUS

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO / TAX COLLECTOR

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-18-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-18-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINITFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TAX COLLECTOR IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY DORAN GIN, SENIOR COLLECTION OFFICER. DEFENDANT LOTTIE TITUS IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO / TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT TITUS, LOTTIE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-18-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
